summary: Dan Shapiro briefly announces a guest post he wrote about the role of a startup CTO, hosted on Scott Porad's blog. He also casually reveals he has started a new company called Sparkbuy, which is in stealth mode but launching soon. The post is essentially a short teaser directing readers elsewhere for the substantive content, while dropping a company announcement almost as an afterthought.
key_points: Shapiro wrote a guest post exploring the true meaning of the startup CTO role
He announces Sparkbuy, a new company in stealth mode about to launch
The casual, almost offhand announcement of a new company reflects startup culture's bias toward action over ceremony
money_quotes: I started a new company, Sparkbuy, which I think I forgot to mention.
key_insight: The post is a brief redirect to a guest article on the startup CTO role, notable mainly for its offhand announcement of a new stealth-mode company.
